pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces; Spring Boot 3.x is required for Java 21 compatibility and Jakarta EE 9+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21 features and bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact mysql:mysql-connector-java is deprecated and removed in newer versions; the new artifact com.mysql:mysql-connector-j is required for compatibility with modern drivers and Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or run on Java 21 due to internal API changes or bytecode version incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.xml.bind dependency with jakarta.xml.bind-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Java 21 environments use Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces (jakarta.*); the javax.xml.bind API is no longer available by default or in the classpath, causing compile/runtime errors.

src/test/java/com/bitbank/OnlineBankingB.general_idea: Remove deprecated @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class) annotation in favor of Spring Boot 3's automatic test context initialization.
